---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the node, installer, devnet, docs, or tooling
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> This is a **preview / prototype**. Requests that imply a live mainnet, sale,
> custody, trading, or guaranteed rewards are out of scope. Keep proposals
> consistent with the preview status.

## Problem / motivation

What problem would this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Area

- [ ] desktop-node
- [ ] installers/windows
- [ ] devnet (loopback-only)
- [ ] docs
- [ ] safety tooling / CI
- [ ] tokenomics docs (numbers must match the JSON)

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references, mockups (no secrets).
